name: Start / Finish (Heavenly Stagecoach)
how_to_see: Lower lot at Stagecoach Lodge — that's the start line, and where I'll finish if things go to plan.
parking_note: Crew can park overnight here. Same spot at the end.

name: Heavenly
how_to_see: Same place as the start — I'm through fast this early.

name: Sierra at Tahoe
how_to_see: First real crew stop — decent chance to see me Saturday mid-morning if the plan holds.
parking_note: Show the crew pass in the windshield. Normal aid parking.

name: Tahoe City
how_to_see: Park at the Transit Center and walk about 0.2 mi to the aid — lakefront, hard to miss.
parking_note: Transit Center parking, then walk in.

name: Brockway Summit
how_to_see: Crew parks in the designated lot and walks 0.6 mi in. A lot of runners nap here.
parking_note: Crew lot, then walk to the aid.

name: Village Green
how_to_see: Use the green-marked crew parking only — late race, crew access.

name: Finish (Heavenly Stagecoach)
how_to_see: Back at Stagecoach. I'm hoping for Monday; cutoff is Tuesday 6 PM if you want to plan travel.
parking_note: Lower lot. Monday finish is the plan.
